HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by being a black and white portrait painting.
UsedFor: It is used for recognizing the work Rashford did during the COVID-19 pandemic.
LocatedIn: It is located in the Withington area of Manchester, United Kingdom.
BuiltBy: It was built by street artist Akse P19.
CreatedBy: It was created by street artist Akse.
ConsistsOf: It consists of a painting and a quote.
PartOf: It is part of the street art project Withington Walls.
KnownFor: It is known for commemorating a footballer's work to reduce child hunger.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Coffee House Café on Copson Street.
NamedAfter: It is named after Marcus Rashford.
About: It is about Marcus Rashford's work to tackle child food poverty.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by a photograph by Daniel Cheetham.

HasA: それは引用を持っています。
